nearest_available_benchmark.reported_result: The two rendered sample-90239 transmission spectra shift relative to one another; the authors identify the shift as evidence of lateral composition nonuniformity. No noticeable change is reported for sample 90211 over the same beam-diameter change.
nearest_available_benchmark.prohibited_inference: specimen point variance, correlation length, covariance family, or three-scale closure

minimum_gopal_data_upgrade: original numerical wide- and focused-beam spectra
coordinates proving the same sampled region
measured or reconstructable beam kernels rather than nominal diameters alone
claim_boundaries: Two scales can establish qualitative scale dependence but cannot test covariance-family closure.
Rendered spectra and maps are not original numerical arrays.
Nominal beam diameter is not a measured point-spread function or Gaussian standard deviation.
Multiple modalities do not count as multiple probe scales.
No specimen covariance parameter, covariance family, detector result, novelty claim, or manuscript authorization is established.
